summary_text: **Recommendation (minimal Phase 5 definition in this repo)** Phase 5 should be specified as a **read-only observability contract over existing P1 state files**, not new orchestration behavior. Scope should explicitly cover these sources: provider/lane logs and phase/run state ([run-state.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/run-state.js#L8), [run-state.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/run-state.js#L10), [run-state.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/run-state.js#L12), [run-state.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/run-state.js#L59)). Use existing surfaces as canonical outputs: bridge status JSON/text ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L844), [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L855)) and execute dashboard ([fugue-execute.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L649), [observability.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/observability.js#L175)). Smallest spec-worthy/testable additions now: 1. Require run-correlation semantics (`runId` in lane events must be parent orchestration run, with separate attempt id if needed). Evidence gap: execute passes runId into matrix ([fugue-execute.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L453)), but bridge logs generated per-attempt runId ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L558), [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L458)). 2. Add contract tests for `--status-json` and `--dashboard --days` shape/filters/fallback on malformed JSONL. Current tests are too shallow for observability contract ([test-bridge-smoke.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-bridge-smoke.mjs#L25), [test-execute-smoke.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-execute-smoke.mjs#L30)). 3. Align CLI docs with actual surface (`--dashboard` is documented for bridge but bridge exposes `--status-json`) ([quick-reference.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/quick-reference.md#L35), [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L84)). **Risks** - **High correctness risk:** per-run observability is unreliable until lane-event `runId` correlation is fixed; incident triage can attribute failures to the wrong run. - **Medium regression risk:** observability outputs are not schema-locked by tests, so field drift can silently break dashboards/automation. - **Workflow risk:** this audit is single-lane independent review; Kernel vote-style multi-lane consensus was not executed.
